title: IMEEA® Red Wine Goblets Brushed Stainless Steel Champagne Cup 325ml/11oz Set of 2 (Silver)
features: Material: Made of premium SUS304 stainless steel with a brushed finish, very studry and super easy to clean, dishwasher safe.
Sleek Design: The brushed stainless steel makes for a very modern look and will match with any dining decor or will fit in with casual outside entertaining.
Keep Wine Chilled: Glasses feel great in your hand, no sharp edges and keep wine chilled longer than glass or crystal.
Wide Application: Casual and chic, perfect for outdoor, bar, pools, decks, boats, picnic, day to day meals, or a lavish dinner party.
Dimension: Top diameter: 2.75 inch (7cm); Base diameter: 2.83 inch (7.2cm); Height: 7 inch (18cm). One year warranty.
description: Product Description High Quality Made of premium SUS304 stainless steel, sturdy and Unbreakable. Wine Goblets Size Capacity: 350ml/12oz, Top diameter: 2.75 inch (7cm); Base diameter: 2.83 inch (7.2cm); Height: 7 inch (18cm). Brushed Finish Surface Stainless Steel wine goblets with brushed surface, the matte modern look can match any of your table decor. Great Gift The stainless steel wine glasses is a perfect gift for Wedding Valentine's Day Christmas New year and Housewaring, Especially for 11th wedding anniversary present.
